---
pagetitle: "404 · Page not found"
title-prefix: ""
description: "This page doesn't exist or has moved."
---

::: {data-site=""}

```{=html}
<div style="min-height:74vh; display:flex; flex-direction:column; align-items:center; justify-content:center; text-align:center; padding:48px 24px; font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace;">
  <div style="font-size:88px; font-weight:700; line-height:1; letter-spacing:-0.02em; color:var(--accent);">404</div>
  <p style="font-size:20px; color:var(--ink); margin:18px 0 6px;">Page not found</p>
  <p style="font-size:14.5px; color:var(--ink2); margin:0 0 30px; max-width:420px; line-height:1.6;">The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has moved. It might have been a paper that changed its address.</p>
  <div style="display:flex; gap:12px; flex-wrap:wrap; justify-content:center;">
    <a href="/" style="font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace; font-size:12.5px; letter-spacing:0.05em; text-transform:uppercase; padding:13px 22px; background:var(--accent); color:#fff; border-radius:4px; font-weight:500;">← Back home</a>
    <a href="/#research" style="font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace; font-size:12.5px; letter-spacing:0.05em; text-transform:uppercase; padding:13px 22px; border:1px solid var(--line); color:var(--ink); border-radius:4px; font-weight:500;">Browse research</a>
  </div>
</div>
```

:::
